visual_description: A woman with curly blonde hair, wearing a dark jacket over a white shirt, is seen touching her neck while looking upward. A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a patterned sweater, is seated and looking slightly to his right. In the background, other people are seated and partially visible, with one man in a blue shirt and cap seen from behind.
